issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as unsupported file formats or parsing failures.
The skill requires Python 3.9+ and specific libraries, limiting compatibility to agents that support Python execution.

scenarios.name: review-employment-contract
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides most rubric items and a pdfplumber snippet, but lacks a concrete overall risk score, earning it a high but not perfect score.

scenarios.name: compare-nda-versions
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides the required code snippet but omits the comparison table, recommendations, and summary, whereas Response B offers no relevant content.
